message:
Chunk SQLite IN-clauses to respect 999-variable limit and add no_db fast paths

SQLite variable limit:
- Chunk all IN (?) clauses in clear_dirty_issues, get_issues_needing_export,
  clear_dirty_flags, and descendant ID queries to stay under SQLite's
  999-variable limit. Prevents "too many SQL variables" errors on large repos.

No-db fast paths:
- Skip auto-import and auto-flush when in no_db mode to avoid creating
  redundant in-memory databases or overwriting JSONL with stale data
- Make no_db_from_layer public for external access
- Add skip_cache_rebuild: true to IssueUpdate structs in defer/epic
  commands to avoid unnecessary cache rebuilds during batch operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,6 +124,7 @@ fn execute_close_eligible(
             status: Some(Status::Closed),
             closed_at: Some(Some(now)),
             close_reason: Some(Some("All children completed".to_string())),
+            skip_cache_rebuild: true,
             ..Default::default()
         };
